flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Vanderbilt University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.0k → $67.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Vanderbilt University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.0k → $67.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Vanderbilt University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Vanderbilt University are 88% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($91.6k vs $48.8k).
